---
title: "Projects"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/allanalmaraz/
---
```{=html}
<style>
.proj-intro {font-size: 1rem; color: #444; max-width: 100%; margin: 0 0 2.5rem 0; text-align: left; line-height: 1.6;}
.section-label {font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #1a1a1a; margin: 2rem 0 0.75rem 0;}
.proj-divider {border: none; border-top: 1px solid #e5e5e5; margin: 1.5rem 0;}
.cards-grid {display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 1rem;}
.proj-card {background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8; border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.5rem; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; display: block; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s;}
.proj-card:hover {border-color: #ccc; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); text-decoration: none; color: inherit;}
.proj-card.muted {opacity: 0.55; cursor: default; pointer-events: none;}
.card-top {display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: flex-start; margin-bottom: 10px;}
.card-icon {width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; margin-bottom: 10px;}
.icon-blue {background: #e8f1fb;} .icon-purple {background: #eeedfe;} .icon-teal {background: #e1f5ee;} .icon-amber {background: #faeeda;} .icon-coral {background: #faece7;} .icon-green {background: #eaf3de;}
.card-title {font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #1a1a1a; margin-bottom: 15px; line-height: 1.3; text-align: left;}
.card-question {font-size: 14px; color: #444; margin-bottom: 15px; text-align: left; line-height: 1.25;}
.card-question strong {color: #444;}
.card-desc {font-size: 14px; color: #444; line-height: 1.25; margin-bottom: 20px; text-align: left;}
.tags {display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 12px; justify-content: flex-start;}
.tag {font-size: 12px; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; background: #f5f5f5; color: #444; border: 1px solid #e8e8e8;}
.card-footer {border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0; padding-top: 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;}
.tools-row {display: flex; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center;}
.tool {font-size: 12px; color: #444; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;}
.tool::before {content: ''; width: 5px; height: 5px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; display: inline-block;}
.card-cta {font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #3b82f6; flex-shrink: 0;}
.card-cta.dim {color: #bbb;}
</style>

<p class="proj-intro">This is where I showcase my work as an analyst. Each project tackles a real business question and walks through the full analytical process, from data preparation to findings and recommendations. Projects are organized into three tracks: <strong>Predictive Analytics</strong>, <strong>Data Visualization</strong>, and <strong>Live Dashboards</strong>. Each card links to a dedicated page covering findings, recommendations, methodology, and key takeaways, with reports, slides, and code attached.</p>

<div class="section-label">Predictive Analytics</div>
<div class="cards-grid">

  <a class="proj-card" href="projects/sun-country/index.html">
    <div class="card-top">
      <div class="card-icon icon-blue">✈️</div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-title">Sun Country Airlines: Customer Segmentation</div>
    <div class="card-question"><strong>Business question:</strong> Who are Sun Country's customers, and how can the airline grow loyalty enrollment and shift bookings to its direct channel?</div>
    <div class="card-desc">Applied K-Means clustering to 15,144 customer records to identify 5 actionable segments, translating findings into three targeted campaigns tied to leadership's goals around Ufly enrollment, direct channel growth, and vacation package differentiation.</div>
    <div class="tags">
      <span class="tag">K-Means Clustering</span>
      <span class="tag">Customer Analytics</span>
      <span class="tag">Segmentation</span>
    </div>
    <div class="card-footer">
      <div class="tools-row">
        <span class="tool">Python</span>
        <span class="tool">Elbow Method</span>
        <span class="tool">EDA</span>
      </div>
      <span class="card-cta">View →</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="proj-card" href="projects/employee-churn/index.html">
    <div class="card-top">
      <div class="card-icon icon-purple">👥</div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-title">Predicting Employee Churn</div>
    <div class="card-question"><strong>Business question:</strong> Which employees are most at risk of churning (leaving), and what organizational factors drive that risk?</div>
    <div class="card-desc">Built and compared logistic regression and decision tree models on 4,653 employee records, achieving 79% recall on the churn class and identifying tenure, compensation tier, and education as the primary drivers of voluntary turnover.</div>
    <div class="tags">
      <span class="tag">Machine Learning</span>
      <span class="tag">HR Analytics</span>
      <span class="tag">Classification</span>
    </div>
    <div class="card-footer">
      <div class="tools-row">
        <span class="tool">Python</span>
        <span class="tool">Cross Validation</span>
        <span class="tool">Decision Tree</span>
      </div>
      <span class="card-cta">View →</span>
    </div>
  </a>

</div>

<div class="section-label">Data Visualization</div>
<div class="cards-grid">

  <div class="proj-card muted">
    <div class="card-top">
      <div class="card-icon icon-teal">📊</div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-title">UCI Basic Needs — Resource Analysis</div>
    <div class="card-question"><strong>Business question:</strong> Where are gaps in basic needs resources at UCI, and which student populations are most underserved?</div>
    <div class="card-desc">Analyzing basic needs data at UCI to surface patterns in food and housing insecurity and inform outreach strategies.</div>
    <div class="tags">
      <span class="tag">Nonprofit Analytics</span>
      <span class="tag">Data Visualization</span>
      <span class="tag">Higher Ed</span>
    </div>
    <div class="card-footer">
      <div class="tools-row">
        <span class="tool">Excel</span>
        <span class="tool">Tableau</span>
      </div>
      <span class="card-cta dim">Coming soon</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="proj-card muted">
    <div class="card-top">
      <div class="card-icon icon-green">☕</div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-title">Starbucks — Customer Segmentation</div>
    <div class="card-question"><strong>Business question:</strong> How do different Starbucks customers respond to offers, and what drives their spending behavior?</div>
    <div class="card-desc">Segmenting Starbucks customers using survey and behavioral data to uncover offer responsiveness and spending patterns.</div>
    <div class="tags">
      <span class="tag">Segmentation</span>
      <span class="tag">Retail Analytics</span>
      <span class="tag">Customer Behavior</span>
    </div>
    <div class="card-footer">
      <div class="tools-row">
        <span class="tool">Python</span>
        <span class="tool">Tableau</span>
      </div>
      <span class="card-cta dim">Planned</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="section-label">Live Dashboards</div>
<div class="cards-grid">

  <div class="proj-card muted">
    <div class="card-top">
      <div class="card-icon icon-amber">🎬</div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-title">Letterboxd — Movies as a Business and a Taste</div>
    <div class="card-question"><strong>Business question:</strong> What do box office trends and personal viewing data reveal about film as both a cultural and commercial product?</div>
    <div class="card-desc">A live window into film data and personal viewing habits, combining box office, ratings, and Letterboxd data that auto-updates as new films are logged.</div>
    <div class="tags">
      <span class="tag">Live Data</span>
      <span class="tag">Entertainment Analytics</span>
      <span class="tag">Personal Data</span>
    </div>
    <div class="card-footer">
      <div class="tools-row">
        <span class="tool">TBD</span>
      </div>
      <span class="card-cta dim">Planned</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="proj-card muted">
    <div class="card-top">
      <div class="card-icon icon-coral">📈</div>
    </div>
    <div class="card-title">QSR Macro Pulse</div>
    <div class="card-question"><strong>Business question:</strong> How do shifts in macroeconomic conditions translate into changes in quick-service restaurant performance?</div>
    <div class="card-desc">A live business monitor tracking how macro indicators like CPI, consumer spending, and unemployment move in relation to quick-service restaurant performance.</div>
    <div class="tags">
      <span class="tag">Macroeconomics</span>
      <span class="tag">FRED Data</span>
      <span class="tag">QSR Industry</span>
    </div>
    <div class="card-footer">
      <div class="tools-row">
        <span class="tool">Python</span>
        <span class="tool">FRED API</span>
        <span class="tool">SEC Filings</span>
      </div>
      <span class="card-cta dim">Planned</span>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
